_meta.purpose: Labeled reference designs used as comparison anchors for the vision judge (#5). The candidate is compared A-vs-B against these; calibrate_via_comparisons converts wins/losses into a score band. Models rank pairs far more reliably than they score in the absolute.

anchors.notes: Restrained palette, decisive type scale, immaculate grid rhythm.
Signature gradient discipline, motion language consistent across CTAs.
Violent type hierarchy, generous whitespace, single focal hero.
Intentional excess; ambition high, execution mostly controlled.
Default blue, centered hero, even spacing - competent but anonymous.
Indigo gradient, emoji bullets, uniform cards - the anti-pattern baseline.
Bold color, springy motion, coherent illustration system.
Monochrome restraint, precise spacing scale, quiet confidence.
